lastReleaseMessage: Security: fix unauthenticated ballot-stuffing on community judge ratings (require auth + server-side one-vote-per-user dedup + rate limit); verify supabase-js 2.110.0 is npm-latest (no applicable CVE); document both

milestone.label: v0.16 - Supabase auth + Stripe subscriptions + live TICA data pipeline

items: Favorability recommender: judge-favorability for LIVE upcoming shows is impossible â€” TICA publishes no pre-show judge panels (confirmed 2026-06-30). Reframed honestly: calendar now ranks by cat's home TICA region + soonest, and favorability lights up per show once the user logs its panel. Optional future: import judges from club flyers when available.
Breed line-art generation/harvest (icon system wired; 5 of ~60 breeds live) â€” BLOCKED on a one-time Chrome download grant for midjourney.com (Kane's click)

Multi-user cat sharing SHIPPED + verified working (2026-06-30): owner adds an agent by email; agent gets FULL access (own overlay in their blob), grouped 'Cats I'm an agent for'; leak-critical single-cat extraction unit-tested; super-admin view-as loads the viewed user's agent cats. Remaining: MERGED co-ownership (shared writes both see), email invite notification, reg-number join requests + certificate verification
Auth polish: magic-link / verification edge cases

Security (docs/SECURITY.md): full sprint 2026-06-30 (v0.17.2-0.17.6). DONE: CSP+headers (run_worker_first), rate limits, audit log, prototype-pollution guard, shared-cat payload sanitization, seed-share owner-check, DB advisor lockdown (billing_sync anon-only, migration 0006), leaked webhook revoked, rotation runbook. Turnstile fully pre-wired (config-only activation). OPEN (all human/dashboard-gated or large builds): Turnstile widget (CF dashboard, deploy token lacks scope), relational-RLS migration (structural), ownership cert verification (feature), merged co-ownership authz (when built). KANE ACTION: recreate Ring Resources Bot webhook (old revoked)
